args.text: Both services confirmed patched: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: auth-api patched to v5.8.4 and session-store patched to v2.2.9. Both versions verified. Credential rotation to follow.

args.comment: auth-api and session-store patched and verified. Proceeding to credential rotation.

args.text: Credential rotation complete: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediating CVE-2026-30117, we've patched auth-api and session-store and rotated signing keys. All staff will need to sign in again. Thanks for your patience.

args.comment: Remediation complete: services patched and verified, credentials rotated, staff notified, register updated.
